---
name: "\U0001F41B Bug Report"
about: Create a report to help us improve TASK-alavista
title: 'fix: [Brief description of the bug]'
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Create a task with the following format: `- [ ] #schedule ...`
2. Go to '...'
3. Click on '....'
4. See error

## 🛑 Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 💻 Environment Setup

- **OS:** [e.g., macOS Sonoma, Windows 11, iOS 17]
- **Obsidian Version:** [e.g., v1.5.3]
- **TASK-alavista Version:** [e.g., v1.0.0]
- **Calendar App:** [e.g., Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, Outlook]
- **Where is your vault stored?** [e.g., iCloud Drive, Local, Dropbox]

## 📋 Task Format Examples

*Please paste the exact Markdown of the task(s) that are failing so we can test the RegEx parser.*

```markdown
- [ ] #schedule YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM "Task Title"
```

## 🔍 Error Logs

*Please open the Obsidian Developer Console (`Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + I`) and paste any relevant errors here:*

```text
[Paste console errors here]
```

## 📸 Screenshots (Optional)

If applicable, add screenshots of the Sidebar View or Calendar App to help explain your problem.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., "This only happens when using recurring tasks" or "The bug disappears if I restart Obsidian").
